name: NextLens Top-Down Bridge
description: Deterministic v1 top-down Feature packet bridge with validation and correction routing
author: NextLens Team

plugins.name: NextLens Setup
plugins.description: Register or refresh the NextLens BMad module in this project.

plugins.name: NextLens New Packet
plugins.description: Create one Feature packet from top-down discovery context.

plugins.name: NextLens Doctor
plugins.description: Run non-mutating validation checks on a Feature packet or landscape.

plugins.name: NextLens Salmon
plugins.description: Route correction findings through deduplication and impact classification.
